subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: That Cow was indeed a sacred being who was highly revered, honored and esteemed among the Children of Israel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آن گاو هم نفسی بوده است که در میان بنی اسرائیل بسیار محترم و معتبر و معزز بوده است
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
